description: Replace regex-based complexity calculation in coderef-core with AST-based calculation using the existing tree-sitter parser. Current implementation uses naive regex counting (if/for/while/&&/||) which is inaccurate. Tree-sitter AST parser is available but not being used for complexity metrics.
goal: Implement proper cyclomatic complexity calculation using AST traversal for accurate metrics instead of regex pattern matching
requirements: Replace regex-based complexity counting in complexity-generator.ts with AST-based calculation
Leverage existing tree-sitter-scanner.ts for AST parsing
Implement proper cyclomatic complexity: 1 + number of decision points (if/for/while/catch/&&/||/?:)
Accurate line attribution and scope awareness for complexity scores
Maintain backward compatibility with existing complexity.json output format

success_criteria.complexity_accuracy: Complexity scores match standard cyclomatic complexity definition
success_criteria.coverage: All existing test cases pass with new calculation method
success_criteria.integration: Seamless integration with existing pipeline without breaking changes
success_criteria.performance: AST-based calculation within 20% performance of regex-based
